nasb.text: Now in the eighteenth year of King Josiah, the king sent Shaphan, the son of Azaliah the son of Meshullam the scribe, to the house of the Lord saying,

esv.text: In the eighteenth year of King Josiah, the king sent Shaphan the son of Azaliah, son of Meshullam, the secretary, to the house of the Lord, saying,

cnv.text: 約西亞在位第十八年，王差派米書蘭的孫子、亞薩利的兒子、書記沙番到耶和華的殿，吩咐他說：

ccb.text: 约西亚执政第十八年，他派米书兰的孙子、亚萨利的儿子沙番书记去耶和华的殿，并吩咐他说：
